data.title: Transocean Ltd. prices upsized public offering of 125M shares at $3.05 each, expecting approx $381.25M in gross proceeds.
data.description: Steinhausen, Switzerland, Sept. 24, 2025 - Transocean Ltd. revealed that they have priced an underwritten public offering of 125,000,000 of their shares, having a par value of $0.10 each, at $3.05 per share. Initially planning to sell 100,000,000 shares, the company increased the offering size. The total gross proceeds from the transaction, before deducting underwriting discounts, commissions, and expenses, are anticipated to be around $381,250,000. All shares involved in the offering are from Transocean's own holdings. Moreover, Transocean has given the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 18,750,000 additional shares at the same offering price, barring underwriting discounts and commissions. The closure of the offering is scheduled for September 26, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing criteria.

data.title: Sioux Honey Co-op and Hy-Vee donate 3 tons (6,000 lbs) of honey to Kansas City nonprofits, delivering sweetness.
data.description: Sioux Honey Co-op, in partnership with Hy-Vee grocery stores, recently made a significant donation of over 6,000 pounds of honey to two Kansas City-based nonprofits. This generous contribution was delivered in September 2025 and aimed to support the local community. The collaboration between Sioux Honey Co-op and Hy-Vee grocery stores highlights their commitment to giving back and supporting organizations in need.

data.title: Angelalign Technologies (6699.HK) stays confident despite rival ALGN's new complaint; Angel defends against the allegation.
data.description: In San Clemente, California, on September 24, 2025, Angelalign Technology Inc. (6699.HK), also known as Angel, expresses steadfast confidence amidst industry giant Align Technology Inc. (ALGN) filing a new baseless lawsuit against them in the U.S. The company stands firm in its position despite this legal challenge.
